payload.answer: mem_new was returned because it is the current memory matching Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered because it is marked as superseded, so it should not be surfaced as an active/current fact.
payload.decision: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current, non-superseded memory matching the query entity/context. mem_old was filtered because it has been superseded and should not be presented as current.

entity_resolution.reason: The query refers to Sam in the Goldman context; recall selected the current memory for that resolved context while excluding superseded records.

payload.intent: Explain recall/debug behavior for Sam from Goldman, specifically why mem_new was returned and mem_old was filtered.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new is the active memory for Sam from Goldman and was eligible to be returned.
mem_old was excluded from recall because it is superseded by mem_new.

details: Explained that mem_new is current and recall-eligible.
Explained that mem_old was filtered due to supersession.
Did not present the superseded memory as current.

repair_options: If mem_old should still be visible for audit purposes, expose it only in a debug/history view, not as current recall.
If mem_old was incorrectly marked superseded, remove or correct the supersession link.
If Sam from Goldman was incorrectly resolved, review entity resolution and affiliation context.
